SEARCH
Package sc.fiji.snt.tracing

Class DefaultSearchNode

java.lang.Object
sc.fiji.snt.tracing.DefaultSearchNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<DefaultSearchNode>, SearchNode
public class DefaultSearchNode extends Object implements SearchNode, Comparable<DefaultSearchNode>
A SearchNode which can maintain both a from-start and from-goal search state.
